domitor.relationship_summary: Property guardian and constant companion. Absolute loyalty reinforced through routine feeding and proximity.

first_contact.context: Taken in as a working guard dog shortly after Butch acquired the house near his garage.

bond.blood_bond_notes: Responds instantly to Butch’s presence, voice, and scent. Will fight to the death if Butch is threatened.

awareness.knowledge_notes: Operates purely on instinct reinforced by vitae and conditioning.

presentation.style_summary: Large, muscular Rottweiler kept as a guard dog.

public_profile.cover_story: A vicious but well-trained guard dog used to protect Butch’s property.

hidden_profile.false_identity_notes: No veterinary records under current name.

domitor_awareness_of_truth.notes: Butch is aware the dog has lived far longer than normal.

mechanics.concept: Ghoul Rottweiler guard dog with full run of house and yard

disciplines.name: Potence
disciplines.notes: Expressed as unnatural bite force and striking power.

health.notes: Heals faster than a normal animal when fed vitae.

derived_stats.movement: Fast (can sprint entire yard in seconds)

dependency.notes: Becomes unstable and violently restless without access to Butch.

risks.risk_notes: Primary risk arises if witnesses observe unnatural endurance.

to_domitor.notes: Positions itself between Butch and any perceived threat.

notes.one_liner: A silent, relentless ghoul Rottweiler guarding Butch Reed’s home.
notes.expanded: Brutus has full run of the house and yard via a dog door, treating both as a single territory. Rarely barks—intruders usually realize they are noticed only moments before he attacks.
notes.st_only: Escalation tool before direct confrontation with Butch.
